title: coleus sanguineus
intro: Coleus sanguineus, also known as the Flame Coleus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, characterized by its vibrant red, orange, and yellow foliage. The plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Ayurvedic and Unani practices, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Coleus sanguineus include reducing inflammation and alleviating symptoms of fever, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Coleus sanguineus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in topical applications, such as creams and ointments, to treat skin conditions and wounds.
